name: devbugger
description: A tree-shaking friendly D&&BUG pattern with a tiny CLI helper to toggle the debugging flag on or off

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run amend
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run amend
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run amend
scripts.amend: npm run version && git add . && git commit --amend --no-edit
scripts.test: rm -f test/devbugger.js && npm run test:create && rollup -c test/rollup.js && npm run test:off && npm run test:on && rm -f test/devbugger.js

author: Andrea Giammarchi
